title: Billionaire Uber co-founder reveals he’s joined exodus from California
summary: Uber co-founder Travis Kalanick says he has traded California for Texas, joining a growing list of billionaires abandoning the state as left-leaning lawmakers push for a one-off wealth tax. Speaking about his robotics startup Atoms on TPBN, Kalanick confirmed the move and framed it as a response to California’s fiscal and regulatory climate.

title: Fmr. Obama Official Rattner: Lack of Immigration Isn't Hurting Job Market, There’s No Shortage
summary: On Bloomberg's Wall Street Week, former Obama administration official Steve Rattner argued that while he favors more immigration, claims that a lack of immigrants is causing a labor shortage and hurting the job market are overblown. The remarks directly engage the ongoing political debate over immigration, jobs, and policy responses.

title: French mayoral elections gauge far-right strength before presidential ballot
summary: French municipal elections are being watched as a test of the far-right's momentum and a potential warning sign ahead of next year's presidential race, prompting concern among mainstream parties and debates about political stability and polarization.
